summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HERCO360 registration flow after CORS fix. All registration scenarios working correctly: NON-Tienda area (ECCP) registration without sucursal field, Tienda area registration with required sucursal selection, duplicate email error handling with specific backend message, and no CORS errors in browser console.
passed_tests: Backend API: Registration with NON-Tienda area (ECCP) - returns 200, auto-approves, assigns 'Casa Matriz' as sucursal
Backend API: Registration with Tienda area (H1) - returns 200, auto-approves, stores selected sucursal
Backend API: Duplicate email handling - returns 400 with specific error 'El correo ya está registrado'
Backend API: CORS preflight - returns correct headers (allow_credentials=None with wildcard origin '*')
Frontend UI: Registration form with ECCP area - sucursal field correctly hidden, successful registration, navigates to dashboard
Frontend UI: Registration form with Tienda area - sucursal field correctly shown, H1 selection works, successful registration, navigates to dashboard
Frontend UI: Duplicate email error - displays specific backend error message 'El correo ya está registrado' in toast notification
Frontend UI: No CORS errors in browser console during registration flow
